steps.title: Use the slope direction
steps.content: The data rise from left to right, so the linear model should have a positive slope. This eliminates choices A and C.

steps.title: Use the intercept
steps.content: The scatterplot is near $y=15$ when $x=0$, so the model should have a positive $y$-intercept close to $15$. Choice D has a negative intercept, so it does not fit.

steps.title: Choose the matching model
steps.content:
The model with positive slope and a positive intercept near $15$ is
$$y=14.7+10x$$
The answer is B.
